title: Repurposed Structures - Paladins & Preists Compat Datapack
description: Adds Paladin's Sanctuaries to RS villages!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Paladins & Preists. You will find sanctuaries in RS's Overworld Villages! Have fun!

- Paladins & Preists can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L16BPBvl/images/4204db238187712750e519979285358aef8c2c14.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L16BPBvl/images/4204db238187712750e519979285358aef8c2c14.png)

**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
